error_signature: Google Sheets Read node returns duplicate items
title: Google Sheets Read Node Outputs Duplicate Rows
symptom: The Google Sheets Read node is returning each row of data twice, resulting in duplicate items in the output.
applies_when: Sheet has multiple rows of data
not_this_if: Only one row of data in the sheet
Node is configured correctly with Execute Once
root_cause: The Google Sheets Read node may be configured to process multiple input items, causing it to read the same rows multiple times. This can happen if the node is not set to execute only once or if there are multiple triggering items.
fix_steps: Open the Google Sheets Read node settings
Ensure there is only one input item
Save the workflow and run it again
agent_instruction: Check the input item settings and enable 'Execute Once' in the Google Sheets Read node.
